content:
# R6 Siege Coach — Session Handoff

_Last updated: 2026-03-21 | Y11S1 "Operation Silent Hunt" active_
_Historical session notes: see `SESSION_HANDOFF_ARCHIVE.md`_

---

## The Stack

_As of 2026-03-21 repull (54–99M for main stack). All climbing._

| Callsign | Tracker | Role | Y10S4 Rank | Y11S1 Rank | RP | Matches |

| Grant | Eh_Grant | IGL / Flex | Emerald I | Emerald III | 3,728 | 99 |

| TazRathmus | TazRathmus | Unranked (1,063 RP, 3M) | Unranked (0M) | 1,238 |

⚠️ D-Man + TazRathmus: ALL_TIME + Y10S4 pulled 2026-03-14. Y10S4 samples tiny (2M / 3M). Y11S1: both at 0M — below pull threshold.

---

## Knowledge Base Structure

All files live in `/R6 Siege Coach/Knowledge Base/`.

### GAME/ — Game Knowledge

| File | Contents | Status |
|------|----------|--------|
| `GAME_01_RANKED_FORMAT.md` | Season structure, RP/rank tiers, match rules, stat definitions, R6 Tracker pull guide (season=41 for Y11S1) | ✅ |
| `GAME_02_ATTACKERS.md` | Full ATK operator roster — gadget, role, validation notes. Solid Snake added Y11S1. | ✅ |
| `GAME_03_DEFENDERS.md` | Full DEF operator roster — gadget, role, validation notes. Denari (Y10S3), Skopós + Sentry (Y11S1) included. | ✅ |
| `GAME_04_MAPS.md` | All maps — bomb sites, characteristics, stack performance notes. Y11S1 rotation. | ✅ |
| `GAME_05_ROLES_AND_META.md` | Role definitions, strategy concepts, team identity summary | ✅ |
| `GAME_06_CURRENT_SEASON.md` | Y11S1 "Operation Silent Hunt" — Solid Snake, balance changes, map pool, coaching context | ✅ |
| `GAME_07_OPERATOR_META.md` | Y11S1 tier list (S/A/B/C/D ATK + DEF), ban rates, pick rates, practical coaching notes on what community actually runs. Source: GamsGo 2026-03-06 (pro league + Diamond+ data). | ✅ |

### STATS/ — Stats Reference

| File | Contents | Status |
|------|----------|--------|
| `STATS_ALL_TIME.md` | Team-wide comparison tables (Win%/K/D by map). Individual data is authoritative in per-player ALL_TIME.md files. | ✅ |

### OPERATORS/ — Operator KB Files

Deep reference files for every operator. Gadget mechanics, loadout, playstyle, synergies, meta notes, stack coaching notes. **All 77 files wiki-verified (Mar 2026).**

- **ATK/ — 39 files** (Solid Snake added Y11S1)
- **DEF/ — 38 files** (Denari, Skopós, Sentry included)

> ⚠️ **Always read the relevant operator file before writing any strat watch-for notes.** Gadget names and mechanics must come from the KB, not memory.

### MAPS/ — Map KB Files

Maps with developed strats use a **folder structure**: `MAPS/<Map>/` containing `_OVERVIEW.md` + per-site strat files (`ATK_*.md`, `DEF_*.md`).

Maps without strats remain as flat `.md` files.

**Folder maps (strats in progress):**
- `MAPS/Villa/` — `_OVERVIEW.md` + 4 ATK strat files + 4 DEF strat files

**Flat maps (no strats yet):** Bank.md, Border.md, Chalet.md, Clubhouse.md, Coastline.md, Consulate.md, Emerald_Plains.md, Favela.md (stub), Fortress.md, Kafe Dostoyevsky.md, Kanal.md, Lair.md, Nighthaven_Labs.md, Oregon.md, Outback.md, Skyscraper.md, Stadium_Bravo.md (stub), Theme_Park.md

> ⚠️ **When building strats for any new map:** create `MAPS/<Map>/` folder, move the flat file to `_OVERVIEW.md`, then create `ATK_*.md` and `DEF_*.md` per site.

**Correct Villa site names (verified siege.gg):**
- Aviator Room / Games Room (2F)
- Trophy Room / Statuary Room (1F)
- Kitchen / Dining Room (1F)
- Living Room / Library (1F — shunned, rarely picked)

### PLAYERS/ — Per-Player Folders

Each player: `PROFILE.md`, `ALL_TIME.md`, `Y10S4.md` (archived ✅), `Y11S1.md` (active 🔲).

| Player | ALL_TIME | Y11S1 | Notes |
|--------|----------|-------|-------|
| Grant | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 99M repulled 2026-03-21 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (13 maps). Current. |
| Sarge | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 89M repulled 2026-03-21 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (13 maps). Current. |
| Hound | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 77M repulled 2026-03-21 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (13 maps). Current. |
| Slug | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 54M repulled 2026-03-20 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (13 maps). Current. |
| Smigs | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 26M repulled 2026-03-21 | ⚠️ Below 30M — no map data yet. Re-pull at 30M. |
| Peej | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 44M repulled 2026-03-21 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (11 maps). Current. |
| Bob | ✅ R6T 2026-03-05 | 🔲 21M repulled 2026-03-20 | ⚠️ Below 30M — no map data yet. Re-pull at 30M. |
| Krafty | ✅ 2026-03-05 | 🔲 58M repulled 2026-03-21 | ✅ Map data repulled 2026-03-21 (11 maps). Current. Tracker: Eh_KraftySmokes |
| D-Man | ✅ R6T 2026-03-14 | 🔲 0M as of 2026-03-14 | Y10S4: 2M only (⚠️ small). Prev username: TheMighty-i002. Pull Y11S1 at 10+M |
| Hunter | ✅ R6T 2026-03-15 | 🔲 3M as of 2026-03-15 | **B Team** (moved from C Team 2026-03-15). Y10S4: 22M (⚠️ below 30M). Prev: Eh_Burttis. Pull Y11S1 at 10+M |
| TazRathmus | ✅ R6T 2026-03-14 | 🔲 0M as of 2026-03-14 | Y10S4: 3M only (⚠️ small). Prev username: Eh_Tyrone. Pull Y11S1 at 10+M |

### STACK/ — Team Files

| File | Contents | Status |
|------|----------|--------|
| `STACK_01_MAIN_STACK.md` | Roster, formations, ATK/DEF identity, map strategy, coaching priorities | ✅ |
| `STACK_02_B_TEAM.md` | B Team profiles (Peej/Bob/Krafty), promotion readiness, repull checklist | ✅ |
| `STACK_03_ATTACK_STRATS.md` | **Master ATK index** — formation philosophy + status table linking to `MAPS/<Map>/ATK_*.md` files. Older map strats (Bank, Border, etc.) still inline pending migration. | ✅ |
| `STACK_04_DEFENSE_STRATS.md` | **Master DEF index** — defensive identity + status table linking to `MAPS/<Map>/DEF_*.md` files. Older map strats still inline pending migration. | ✅ |
| `STACK_05_MAP_VETO.md` | Map veto strategy and ban order | ✅ |
| `STACK_06_C_TEAM.md` | C Team profiles (D-Man/TazRathmus) — rarely play, not in regular pull cycle. Hunter moved to B Team 2026-03-15. | ✅ |

### META/ — Process Files

| File | Contents |
|------|----------|
| `META_01_COACHING_DOCS.md` | Log of all generated reports and coaching documents |
| `META_02_STAT_PULL_PROCESS.md` | **⭐ READ THIS BEFORE ANY STAT PULL.** Full SOP: player roster + tracker usernames, browser automation requirement, URL templates, step-by-step pull process, field capture reference, validation rules, auto-flag thresholds. |
| `META_03_REPORT_GENERATION_PROCESS.md` | **⭐ READ THIS BEFORE GENERATING REPORTS.** Full SOP: pipeline overview, script commands, what auto-updates vs. what's manual, per-season update checklist, narrative field guidance. |
| `META_04_RIS.md` | **Round Impact Score** — formula spec, component weights, baselines, score history for all 8 players across Y10S4 + Y11S1, update protocol, known limitations. |

### Scripts/ — Automation

| File | Usage | Does |
|------|-------|------|
| `Scripts/write_stats.js` | `node Scripts/write_stats.js Scripts/data/<file>.json` | Reads JSON stat data, writes Y11S1.md for all (or specified) players, auto-flags ops, generates coaching note bullets |
| `Scripts/read_kb.js` | `node Scripts/read_kb.js Scripts/data/<file>.json` | Merges fresh season stats from JSON into `player_data.js` — preserves all narrative fields, auto-updates numeric fields only |
| `Scripts/data/template.json` | Copy → fill in → run scripts | Input data template for all 8 players — blank slate for next pull |
| `Scripts/data/Y11S1_<date>.json` | Record of each pull | Filled data file from each stat pull session. Kept as archive. |
| `Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_docs.js` | `node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_docs.js"` | Generates per-player coaching .docx — full career + Y10S4 recap + Y11S1 outlook (all 8 players) |
| `Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_season_report.js` | `node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_season_report.js" [Player...]` | **Current season focus** — Y11S1 stats front and centre, Y10S4/all-time used for ↑/↓ trend context only. Key Signals auto-generated. One .docx per player. |
| `Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_sos.js` | `node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_sos.js"` | Generates Season-over-Season comparison .docx |
| `Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_team_report.js` | `node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_team_report.js"` | Generates Main Stack team report .docx |

**Stat pull workflow (summary):**
1. Read `META_02_STAT_PULL_PROCESS.md`
2. Pull stats via browser automation (r6.tracker.network — WebFetch is blocked)
3. Fill `Scripts/data/Y11S1_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
4. Run `node Scripts/write_stats.js Scripts/data/Y11S1_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
5. Update SESSION_HANDOFF.md ranks + player status table

**Report generation workflow (summary):**
1. Read `META_03_REPORT_GENERATION_PROCESS.md`
2. Run `node Scripts/read_kb.js Scripts/data/Y11S1_YYYY-MM-DD.json`
3. Review / update narrative fields in `player_data.js` if needed (priorities, balanceNotes)
4. Run `node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_docs.js" && node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_sos.js" && node "Scripts/Coaching Docs/generate_team_report.js"`
5. Log in `META_01_COACHING_DOCS.md`

---

## Strat File Convention

Per-site strat files live in `MAPS/<Map>/` and follow this naming convention:

- `ATK_<Site>.md` — Attack strat
- `DEF_<Site>.md` — Defense strat

### ATK File Template Structure

```
# <Map> — <Site> · ATTACK
Status / Formation / Developed date / Data source
> Site context (WR, round count, priority note)
## Spawn
## Roles (table + per-player descriptions)
## Execute Sequence (numbered steps)
## Plant Position (PP)
## Post-Plant (table)
## Win Conditions
  ### Win A — Primary Execute
  ### Win B — [specific contingency]
  ### Win C — [specific contingency]
  ### Win D — [early man advantage / chaos]
## Watch For (operator-specific, gadget-accurate)
## Audibles
```

### DEF File Template Structure

```
# <Map> — <Site> · DEFENSE
Status / Developed date / Data source
> Site context
## Anchor Assignments (per-player)
## Gadget Deployment
## Reinforcement Priority
## Post-Plant Hold
## Win Conditions
  ### Win A — Primary Hold
  ### Win B — [contingency]
## Watch For
## Notes
```

---

---

## Teachings Audit Findings — 2026-03-17

_Audit completed 2026-03-17. Full synthesis in chat. Items below are all actionable. Split into: quick fixes, structural gaps, and new deliverables._

### Quick Fixes (file errors / consistency)

| Item | Priority |
|------|----------|
| **CONCEPT_INDEX — recount ×N confidence markers** ✅ | 2026-03-17. Fixed 7 headers: Crosshair Placement ×5→×7, subsection ×5→×7, Trap Usage ×4→×5, Info vs Kill Mode ×4→×5, Trap Operators on Roam ×3→×4, Round Pacing ×3→×4, Movement During Gunfights ×4→×5. Sources line updated to reference Athieno. |
| **README.md — update channel + video count** ✅ | 2026-03-17. Channels: 1→2. Videos: 19→21. Tips count note clarified (220+ NotJoeyBlack only; Athieno in META_06). |
| **VID_016–VID_019 — add missing footers and Video Info fields** ✅ | 2026-03-17. All 4 files: added Title field, normalized "Date Added"→"KB Date", appended footer lines. |
| **META_06 Roster Strength Index — fix tier labels** ✅ | 2026-03-17. Thorn: S-tier→A-tier (#7). Skopos: A-tier→S-tier (#2). |
| **PLAYER_INDEX — audit confidence labels** ✅ | 2026-03-17. 13 label corrections: Crosshair Placement ×4→×7 (Grant, Peej, Hunter, Bob, D-Man, TazRathmus), Clock ×4→×5 (Hound, Smigs, Hunter, TazRathmus), Stop Moving ×2/×3→×5 (Hound, Sarge, Bob), ATK Space Taking ×2 Watch→×4 Tier 1 (Grant), K/D Wrong Metric ×2/×4→×3 Tier 2 (Slug, Krafty). |
| **META_06 — add source-conflict note vs. GAME_07** ✅ | 2026-03-17. Added "Source Reconciliation Note" section with Vigil/Thorn/Dokkaebi divergence table and rule-of-thumb for which source to use when. |

### Structural Gaps (KB wiring) — All 5 Complete ✅ 2026-03-17

| Item | Status |
|------|--------|
| **STACK files — add teaching cross-references** ✅ | 2026-03-17. STACK_01 Priority Coaching Items (5 items), STACK_02 Coaching Notes (4 players), STACK_06 Player Profiles (2 players) — all have inline `→ KB:` tip references linking coaching priorities to specific VID tips. |
| **Operator KB files — add Teaching References section** ✅ | 2026-03-17. 7 priority ops: Thorn, Fenrir, Valkyrie, Kapkan (DEF) + Ace, Hibana, Vigil (ATK) — all have `## Teaching References` sections added pointing to relevant VID tips beyond VID_012. |
| **PLAYER_INDEX — add RIS component linkage** ✅ | 2026-03-17. All 8 players (Grant, Slug, Hound, Smigs, Sarge, Peej, Bob, Krafty) now have a `**RIS (Y10S4):**` note below their Pattern line — score, primary drag component + weight, and which priority tip addresses it. |
| **VID files — add reverse "Applies To" section** ✅ | 2026-03-17. All 19 NotJoeyBlack VID files (VID_001–VID_019) + 2 Athieno files have `## Roster Application Summary` sections mapping video tips to specific players. |
| **PLAYER_INDEX — add V1.T09 (Role Consistency) to Sarge** ✅ | 2026-03-17. V1.T09 added as P2 in Sarge's priority table (between FFA warmup and Utility Philosophy). Teaching note: entry-role/utility-op mismatch — STACK_01 Priority #1 addressed directly in PLAYER_INDEX. |

### New Deliverables

| Item | Priority |
|------|----------|
| **Coaching Briefs — Main Stack (5 players)** ✅ | 2026-03-17. Generated: Grant, Slug, Hound, Smigs, Sarge. Saved to `Coaching Briefs/`. META_05 source hierarchy followed: Operator KB (baseline) → Player KB (problem ID) → Video Teachings (ceiling elevation only, never diagnosis) → HIGH_CONFIDENCE (foundational principles). Five-priority structure per brief. All 5 validated ✅. Logged in META_01. |
| **Weekly Coaching Digest** ✅ | 2026-03-17. `Coaching_Digest_Y11S1.docx` created in `Coaching Briefs/`. Also a `.md` companion file. Generator script: `docx_work/coaching_digest.js`. Week 1 entry: teaching focus (Utility Defines Space Ownership + ATK Space Taking, Tier 1 HIGH_CONFIDENCE), stat snapshot table, per-player focus (all 5), data pull gates table, mid-season map swap prep, META notes (Castle+Kaid, Snake/Vigil, Zofia M762). To update: edit `coaching_digest.js` with new week's data and re-run. |
| **RIS Gap Analysis — per player** ✅ | 2026-03-17. RIS_Gap_Analysis_Y11S1.docx created. All 8 players: Y11S1 score + component breakdown (ESR/KDA/HS%) + root cause + VID tip mapping + coaching insight. Ordered by urgency: Krafty (17.1, data-gated) → Bob (30.9) → Slug (43.5) → Hound (43.8) → Smigs (49.7) → Peej (52.3) → Sarge (54.3) → Grant (63.1). Logged in META_01. |
| **Session Plan Templates by coaching scenario** ✅ | 2026-03-20. `Session_Plan_Templates_Y11S1.docx` created in `Coaching Briefs/`. Generator: `docx_work/session_plans.js`. Three plans: Session 01 Crosshair Placement (trigger: HS% below 45%), Session 02 Roam Discipline (trigger: DEF WR below 45%, roamers dying early), Session 03 Entry Execution (trigger: ATK op WR below 45% at 50r+ despite OK K/D). Each plan: trigger box, target players table, teaching concepts with VID refs, pre-session prep, 4-phase session structure, coaching questions, green/red flag success indicators, follow-up tracking. 306 paragraphs validated ✅. Logged in META_01. |
| **Weekly/Bi-Weekly Coaching Digest** ✅ | 2026-03-17. `Coaching_Digest_Y11S1.docx` created in `Coaching Briefs/`. Generator: `docx_work/coaching_digest.js` (rerun each week with updated data). Validated 150 paragraphs. |

---

## Pending — Next Session

### ✅ RIS Formula Review — COMPLETED 2026-03-21 (v1.0 → v1.1)
Two rounds of formula updates applied to `compute_ris.js`.

**Round 1 — Options A + B (earlier 2026-03-21):**
- **Option A** ✅ — Small-sample flag raised from `matches < 20` → `< 30`. Bob (21M) and Smigs (26M) now both flagged ⚠️.
- **Option B** ✅ — Clutch confidence dampening: `clutch_score *= Math.min(matches / 30, 1.0)`. Applied after cap.

**Round 2 — RIS v1.1 (later 2026-03-21):**
- **KDA/KD Blend** ✅ — KDA slot now 70/30 blend of KDA and K/D. Rationale: tracker assists are damage-only, but KD anchors raw kill efficiency. `kda_score = kda_norm × 0.70 + kd_norm × 0.30`.
- **HS% reduced** ✅ — Weight dropped 15% → 10%. Gadget kills (Thorn Razorbloom, Kapkan EDD, Fuze, Maestro) dilute HS% unfairly for utility-heavy operators.
- **Win Rate added** ✅ — 5% weight. WR baseline 50%. Rewards consistent winners across varied team contexts.
- All 8 player Y11S1.md files updated via `--update`. Hardcoded RIS in `generate_mstack_briefs.js`, `generate_bteam_briefs.js`, and `ris_gap_analysis.js` all updated. All 9 affected docx files regenerated. META_04 fully updated with v1.1 formula spec, version history, and new Score History table.
- **v1.1 scores:** Smigs 65.7 ⚠️ / Grant 56.4 / Peej 53.6 / Sarge 51.1 / Slug 47.0 / Hound 44.9 / Bob 34.9 ⚠️ / Krafty 23.3

## Data Pull Protocol

When pulling from R6 Tracker, always:

1. **Label ATK and DEF explicitly** before each block — never copy into a mixed list
2. **Validate every op** against GAME_02_ATTACKERS.md or GAME_03_DEFENDERS.md before saving — if it doesn't belong on that side, it's a pull error
3. **Sanity-check stats:** K/D > 5.0 or < 0.1 on >10r = likely misread; Win% > 95% or < 5% on >10r = check again
4. **Update all four fields together:** ATK ops, DEF ops, player profile narrative, coaching notes
5. **R6 Tracker season filter:** Use `season=41` for Y11S1 data. `season=40` for Y10S4 archive pulls if ever needed.

---

## Report Generation Notes

When generating a coaching report:
- **Always read KB files first** — every player PROFILE.md, ALL_TIME.md, and current season .md before writing any script values. Never rely on memory or prior session data.
- **Operator tables** sorted by rounds played, highest to lowest. State this explicitly in the report.
- **Atk% / Def%** = win rate when playing that side (not a round count split). Define this in the report.
- **All stats are ranked-only.** State data source and pull date.
- **Small sample caveat** for any op with fewer than 15 rounds or any map with fewer than 5 matches.
- **Win rate color coding:** green = 60%+ WR, red = below 45% WR. Include a legend.
